abilities.name: Hard to Wound +1
abilities.description: Damage flips against this character suffer -.

abilities.name: Pneumatic Entrenching Spikes
abilities.description: Cannot move or be pushed except on its turn. Provides Hard Cover, cannot become Prone.

actions: (1) Shield (Labor) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/3 damage. Push 1 yard. Ram Shield Slam: Target suffers 1 damage or becomes Prone.
(1) Riot Gun (Shotgun) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: z10 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3B/4BB damage. Characters gain Slow. Capacity 10, Reload 3.
system.notes: Guardian variant optimized for crowd control. Shotguns fire downward to ricochet (nonlethal levels). Anchored by pneumatic spikes.
